scripts.db:copy: pbcopy < supabase/schema.sql && echo 'Schema copied to clipboard.' && open https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:admin: pbcopy < supabase/promote-admin.sql && echo 'Admin SQL copied.' && open https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:coming-soon: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-coming-soon.sql && echo 'Coming Soon migration copied.' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:reminders: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-content-reminders.sql && echo 'Reminders migration copied.' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:storage: pbcopy < supabase/storage.sql && echo 'Storage SQL copied (1 GB bucket limit).' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:storage-1gb: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-storage-1gb.sql && echo 'Storage 1 GB migration copied.' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:poster: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-poster-url.sql && echo 'Poster URL migration copied.' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:release-tba: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-release-date-tba.sql && echo 'Release date TBA migration copied.' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.db:content-columns: pbcopy < supabase/migrate-content-columns.sql && echo 'Content columns migration copied (poster_url + release_date_tba).' && open -a 'Brave Browser' https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/psicdsfgkqhjvqreroxj/sql/new
scripts.r2:cors: npx wrangler r2 bucket cors put grandeflix-media --file scripts/r2-cors-wrangler.json
